title: JED - JSON Expanded Data for a manifestation
description: New JSON data model for bibliographic data describing manifestations. It is based on both danMARC2 and DKABM data, and the origin of data right now also refers to internal Corepo fields

pid.description: Unique identification of the manifestation e.g 870970-basis:54029519

agencyId.description: The original library agency id or data submitter id

titles.description: Different kinds of titles for this manifestation

main.description: The main title(s) of the manifestation, array because some publications contain more than one work

mainForSearch.description: The main title(s) of the manifestation minus the identifying addition

full.description: The full title(s) of the manifestation including subtitles etc

fullForSearch.description: The full title(s) of the manifestation minus the identifying addition

alternative.description: Alternative titles for this manifestation e.g. a title in a different language
alternative.origin: Marc field 239u, 739u, 745, 512t in special cases / DKABM - dcterms:alternative

identifyingAddition.description: Information that distinguishes this manifestation from a similar manifestation with same title, e.g. 'illustrated by Ted Kirby'

parallel.description: Titles (in other languages) parallel to the main title of the manifestation as found on the publication

translated.description: Danish translation of the main title, not found on the original publication

access.description: Different options for accessing this manifestation, like url etc

accessTypes.description: Access type of this manifestation, physical/online

audience.description: Different kinds of definitions of appropriate audience for this manifestation

generalAudience.origin: Marc field 666u, 667u and 517 / DKABM dcterms:audience with possible xsi:type='dkdcplus:pegi' or xsi:type='dkdcplus:medieraad' or dkabm dc:subject xsi:type='dkdcplus:DBCN'

audienceGeneral.origin: Marc field 666u, 667u and 517 / DKABM dcterms:audience with possible xsi:type='dkdcplus:pegi' or xsi:type='dkdcplus:medieraad' or dkabm dc:subject xsi:type='dkdcplus:DBCN'

childrenOrAdults.description: Is this material for children or adults

schoolUse.description: Is this material for use in schools (folkeskole/ungdomsuddannelse) or is this material for use in schools by the teacher (folkeskole only)

let.description: LET number of this manifestation, defines the readability level, LET stands for læseegnethedstal

score.description: LET number as integer, decimals rounded to the nearest whole number, intervals present highest value, multiple values as array

display.description: LET number, integers, decimal numbers (12,4), intervals (4-11), multiple values (05 + 06 + 07)

levelForChildren8to12.description: Level of difficulty, illustrations, length, and realism in children's literature

difficulty.description: Level expressed as integer on a scale from 1 to 5

illustrationsLevel.description: Level expressed as integer on a scale from 1 to 5

length.description: Level expressed as integer on a scale from 1 to 5

realisticVsFictional.description: Level expressed as integer on a scale from 1 to 5

libraryRecommendation.description: Appropriate audience as recommended by the library

lix.description: Lix number of this manifestation, defines the readability level, Lix stands for læsbarhedsindex

score.description: Lix number as integer, decimals rounded to the nearest whole number, intervals present highest value, multiple values as array

display.description: Lix number, integers, decimal numbers (12,4), intervals (4-11), multiple values (05 + 06 + 07)

mediaCouncilAgeRestriction.description: Media Council age restriction for this manifestation
mediaCouncilAgeRestriction.origin: Media Council age restriction from 006d or 517a

display.description: Age restriction as noted in MARC record

primaryTarget.description: Primary target audience for this manifestation

players.description: Number of players for board games

display.description: PEGI rating as noted in MARC record

catalogueCodes.description: Codes for which part of the Danish National Bibliography this manifestation is part of or codes for local bibliography/catalogue

nationalBibliography.description: Codes for which part of the Danish National Bibliography this manifestation is part of

otherCatalogues.description: Codes for which local bibliography/catalogue this manifestation is part of

cataloguedPublicationStatus.description: The catalogued publication status of this manifestation

code.description: Catalogued publication status of this manifestation, as code

display.description: Catalogued publication status of this manifestation, as displayable text

classifications.description: Classification codes for this manifestation from any classification system

collectionIdentifiers.description: Collections/sources in Corepo this manifestation belongs to

contents.description: Content title entries with possible creators, contributors and playing time for music tracks, sheet music titles, articles, poems, short stories etc.

contributors.description: Contributors to the manifestation, actors, illustrators etc

contributorsFromDescription.description: Additional contributors of this manifestation as described on the publication. E.g. 'på dansk ved Vivi Berendt'

creators.description: Primary creators of the manifestation e.g. authors, directors, musicians etc

creatorsFromDescription.description: Additional creators of this manifestation as described on the publication. E.g. 'tekst af William Warren'

dateFirstEdition.description: The first edition date found in the manifestation

faustNumber.description: The local id as faust number, if the agency uses faust numbers - an integer used for internal administration. This is for FBI-343, where we need to filter a SolR response according to an integer list from a webservice.

gamePlatform.description: The gameplatform of the manifestation, determined from known brands (xbox one, playstation 4, etc.)

genreAndForm.description: The genre and (literary) form of this manifestation

genreForm.description: The genre and (literary) form of this manifestation (new)

hostPublication.description: Details about the host publications of this manifestation

title.description: Title of the publication this manifestation can be found in

creator.description: Creator of the host publication if host publication is a book

edition.description: Edition statement for the host publication

issn.description: ISSN of the publication this manifestation can be found in

isbn.description: ISBN of the publication this manifestation can be found in

issue.description: The issue of the publication this manifestation can be found in

notes.description: Notes about the publication where this manifestation can be found in

pages.description: The pages in the publication where this manifestation can be found in

publisher.description: The publisher of the publication where this manifestation can be found in

publicationType.description: The publication type this manifestation can be found in

display.description: The publication type as display text

publicationStatus.description: The publication status of the manifestation

display.description: The publication status type as display text

section.description: The section of the publication this manifestation can be found in

series.description: Series of the publication this manifestation can be found in

volume.description: The volume of the publication this manifestation can be found in

year.description: The publication year of the publication this manifestation can be found in

summary.description: All details about the publication this manifestation can be found in

identifiers.description: Identifiers for this manifestation - often used for search indexes
identifiers.origin: Marc field 002 and more / DKABM dc:identifier

illAutomationMaterialGroup.description: International Library Loan (ILL) material group for this manifestation

id.description: ILL material group expressed as integer

name.description: Displayable, associated and fixed text for the ILL material group

parallel.description: Parallel languages of this manifestation, e.g. if more languages are printed in the same book

spoken.description: Spoken language in this manifestation e.g. dubbed/synchronized language in movie

subtitles.origin: Marc field 041u / DKABM dc:language with xsi:type='dkdcplus:subtitles'

abstract.description: Summary/abstract languages of this manifestation, if the manifestation contains short summaries of the content in another language

notes.description: Notes about the language or alphabet in this manifestation - e.g. 'Signaturforklaring på dansk, grønlandsk og engelsk'

forVisuallyImpaired.description: read languages for the visually impaired'

forHearingImpaired.description: texted languages for the hearing impaired'

latestPrinting.description: The latest printing of this manifestation e.g. 2. oplag
latestPrinting.origin: Marc field 008az, 521bgc or 250x / DKABM dc:description dkdcplus:version

localId.description: Identification of the local id of this manifestation

manifestationParts.description: Tracks on music album, sheet music content, or articles/short stories etc. in this manifestation

heading.description: Heading for the music content note

parts.description: The creator and title etc. of the individual parts

type.description: The type of manifestation parts, is this music tracks, book parts etc.

display.description: The shelf where the material can be found

relatedPublications.description: Notes about relations to this book/periodical/journal, - like previous names or related journals

objectId.description: Identification of the which object this manifestation belongs to in Corepo

code.description: A code for the type of periodical

physicalDescription.description: New physical description of this manifestation like extent (pages/minutes), illustrations etc.
physicalDescription.origin: Marc field 300 / DKABM dc:format and dcterms:extent

summaryFull.description: A summary of the physical description of this manifestation like extent (pages/minutes), illustrations etc.
summaryFull.origin: Marc field 300 / DKABM dc:format and dcterms:extent

materialUnits.description: Physical description of each material type unit

numberOfPages.description: Number of pages of the manifestation as number

accompanyingMaterial.description: Material that comes with the manifestation (bilag)

publicationStatus.description: The publication status of the manifestation

display.description: The publication status type as display text

placeOfPublication.description: Place(s) of publication as extracted from MARC 260a or 264a, with brackets removed

recordCreationDate.description: The creation date of the record describing this manifestation in the format YYYYMMDD
recordCreationDate.origin: Marc 001d or Corepo admin data creationDate

review.description: If this manifestation is a review, then content from the review is found here, like ratings or the actual review

reviewByLibrarians.description: If this manifestation is a review, then content from the review is found here

rating.description: A rating of the reviewed manifestation

selectionCodes.description: Material selection and its target group

sheetMusicCategories.description: Material that can be identified as sheet music

shelfCreator.description: The creator of the manifestation that the material can be located under on the shelf

display.description: The display name of the creator

sort.description: The sort version of the creator name

shelfmark.description: Information about on which shelf in the library this manifestation can be found
The actual shelfmark - e.g. information about on which shelf in the library this manifestation can be found, e.g. 99.4

postfix.description: A postfix to the shelfmark, eg. 99.4 Christensen, Inger. f. 1935

creator.description: The creator of the manifestation that the material can be located under on the shelf

specialMaterialGroup.description: Code for comics, children's picture books and drama

soundRecording.description: The records type of sound recording - excluding music recordings and its material

code.description: A code for the type of sound recording

source.description: The source of the manifestation, e.g. own library catalogue (Bibliotekskatalog) or online source e.g. Filmstriben, Ebook Central, eReolen Global etc.

specialMaterialGroup.description: Code for comics, children's picture books and drama

dbcVerified.description: Only DBC verified subjects for this manifestation

unitId.description: Identification of the which unit this manifestation belongs to in Corepo unit:538597

universe.description: Literary/movie universe this work is part of, e.g. Wizarding World, Marvel Universe

volume.description: Information about which volume this manifestation is in multi volume work
